name: natallie-native-wrapper
description: Native iOS and Android wrapper tooling for natallie.

scripts.native:android:debug: node scripts/prepare-native-web.mjs && cap sync android && cd android && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home}" ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.native:android:bundle: node scripts/prepare-native-web.mjs && cap sync android && cd android && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home}" ./gradlew bundleRelease
